repo_prior_art.cite: none; ExactID/PartialID catalogue is empty and cited banked proposals are analogue-only

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018DML: product-rate cross-fit ATE DML; LRO/ADML papers give matching orthogonal influence-function machinery separately

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study: event-study IF-equivalence frontier analogue only; no DML/LRO/ADML ATE spectral frontier

published_prior_art.cite: Velez2024DML: DML1/DML2 asymptotic separation under growing K is closest missed comparator but does not subsume DML-LRO-ADML spectral iff threshold

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv: primitive witness pattern analogue only; no finite-support DML/LRO/ADML ATE risk-separation witness

published_prior_art.cite: BrunsSmithDukesFellerOgburn2024ABW: ABW/AutoDML algebraic equivalences, not a finite-support strict DML-LRO-ADML risk-separation witness

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses Velez2024DML, which studies first-order/equivalence failures and bias/MSE separation between DML variants under growing K; it does not kill the kernel but is a closer estimator-frontier comparator than generic remainder-rate papers.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The risk envelope uses Var(phi_n(W)+G_m,n(h)) but does not define the joint Gaussian limit or covariance/independence relation between the EIF summand and the nuisance-remainder limit.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The primitive witness assumptions only force a residual LRO-ADML direction; the strict chain V_D>V_L>V_A also needs a D-L primitive gap or the statement should be weakened to pairwise nonzero gaps on whichever projection differences are active.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add Velez2024DML to Related work and the Conjecture 1 why-new block, explicitly separating its DML1/DML2 growing-K frontier from the proposed DML-LRO-ADML spectral threshold.
Define the local Gaussian experiment for G_m,n(h), including whether cross-fitting makes it independent of the EIF empirical process or what covariance operator enters the variance envelope.

Add primitive nondegeneracy inequalities for each claimed strict pairwise gap, especially D-L, or restate Conjecture 1 as a maximum pairwise separation frontier rather than a universal strict ordering.
Include projection-gap singular values in the observable diagnostic or justify why lambda_min^+(K_n) alone controls the pairwise remainder amplitude after selecting active gap directions.

recommended_next_step: Revise the Conjecture 1/2 statements to pin the joint local experiment and active pairwise gap conditions, then add the missed DML-variant comparator before another novelty pass.
